text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to spot Eishin Flash while browsing
through the stores in the basement floor of a
department store.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have nearly all the ingredients I need. All that's
left is to get some fruits...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A friend of mine wishes to make Valentine's Day
chocolates, so I thought it would be nice to
prepare different desserts for her reference.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In addition to normal chocolate, I plan to make
cupcakes and some other sweets.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you're interested in the process, you're
welcome to observe me as I work.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will begin baking in... an hour and thirty-three
seconds from now.
choice_data_list: I'd love to come and watch!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In that case, could you help me finish up my
shopping? I have twenty more minutes to get the
things I need.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After helping her track down everything on her
list, the two of us go to the kitchen in the
cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There. Preparations are finally complete. I set
some time aside for a break before starting, so
let's have some tea first.
choice_data_list: You look great in those clothes.
You look great in those clothes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Do you think so? Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored to receive such praise. It makes all
the agonizing I did over the design worth it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to the craftspeople who put it
together. Their skill is what truly makes my outfit
come to life.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I chose the base design from a catalog and asked
them to create an outfit with a patissier motif.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I received several design concepts, but they were
all so incredible that I had trouble selecting one.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But then, while debating my choices, I suddenly
recalled the sight of my father making pastries.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's when this design came to me and somehow
I knew... this is what I needed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, this is not what my father wears, but
the design does remind me of him.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
For example, my father's eyes are passionate and
focused. Those qualities are the pride of a
patissier.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am not yet a professional in that line of work,
but even so, I would like to wear something with
the same pride and dignity my father has.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's important to pour one's heart and soul into
every aspect of the baking process, no matter
how insignificant it may seem.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe pastries make people happy simply
because of their taste, but because of the love
that goes into making them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Every smile we help create as patissiers is
absolutely priceless.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must keep that in mind when I wear these
clothes... wherever I may be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she's only making samples for her
friend, I can tell Eishin Flash is putting her all into
making each one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think about how happy her pastries must make
people feel. How could anyone be unhappy after
eating something she made?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But when I tell her as much...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Glück... Happiness, you say?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I wonder if you will become happy
too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I will begin baking in two minutes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When the pastries are done... would you like to
taste them?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I eagerly watch as Eishin Flash deftly
whips up an assortment of desserts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, all sorts of pastries line the table,
infusing the space with their sweet smell. They
look so good, I let out a small, excited squeal
without thinking.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. That is exactly the smile I had hoped to
see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash touches her outfit with a gentle smile.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I hope that is truly the case.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I intend to make these sample desserts to the
best of my ability...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, I would also like to see what kinds of
chocolates are on display in the shops.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
With Valentine's Day approaching, well-known
shops from other prefectures should have shops in
the larger department stores soon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When they do... would you like to come with me
to see their displays?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash looks so happy as she bakes, but
there's also a dignified air about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a feeling I'm seeing her in the same way she
saw her father in all his gallant glory.
